title: The Backrooms [ Blocks ]
description: It adds some from level 0 of the backrooms  also i'm a little new to mod making so don't judge to hard
body:
This project adds some blocks from level 0 of the backrooms. I recommend using shaders like Bliss also im new to mod making so don't expect it to be perfectly compatible with other mods.

[ Credits ]
Made with Mcreator
Textures/Models made with BlockBench
